overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a fog-shrouded urban street. The environment features historic stone buildings, parked vehicles, and thick atmospheric fog creating low visibility and an ominous mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with historic apartment buildings

events.description: game location text 'Carroll Street' appears on screen indicating the street name
character walks past the stone building entrance and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street, passing historic buildings on the left side

sparse-leaved tree with autumn foliage on the sidewalk
ornate black lamppost with glass enclosure
regulatory street sign mounted on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fog-shrouded residential street lined with historic stone apartment buildings. Sparse deciduous trees and vintage street lamps emerge from the thick fog as the character passes the building entrance, with game text indicating 'Carroll Street' appearing briefly.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked vehicles and fencing

events.description: character walks past a parked black sedan on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, navigating past a parked car and approaching a fenced area

metal wire fence running parallel to the street
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the historic building into a section of street with parked vehicles. A black sedan is passed on the right while a chain-link fence becomes visible through the fog on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area with utility vehicles and trash receptacles

events.description: passing a white delivery van parked on the right side near the fence

agents.ego_description: walking past parked utility vehicles and trash bins along the foggy curb

black metal public trash can on the sidewalk
electrical wires spanning across the street between utility poles

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the street, passing a white delivery van parked on the right. The chain-link fence becomes more prominent on the left, and overhead power lines become visible through the fog against the gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced street beneath overhead power lines toward a distant warehouse

entered.detail: octagonal traffic sign on metal pole at intersection
large brick industrial building with multiple windows emerging from fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a increasingly industrial section of street dominated by overhead power lines and utility poles. A large industrial warehouse becomes visible through the fog on the left, while the chain-link fence continues parallel to the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse approach with loading dock

events.description: approaching the large industrial warehouse building at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the large brick warehouse building, walking along the perimeter fence

entered.detail: raised concrete loading platform with metal railings and stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the street where a large industrial warehouse dominates the left side. A concrete loading dock becomes visible as the character nears the building, with the chain-link fence running alongside the warehouse perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a fog-shrouded residential street that transitions from a view of historic architecture to a more industrial urban corridor. It begins with the character walking past stone apartment buildings, where sparse deciduous trees and vintage street lamps emerge from the thick haze as the name Carroll Street briefly appears. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts away from the building entrances and deeper into the atmospheric fog. The perspective then opens up to reveal a row of parked vehicles, passing a black sedan on the right before a chain-link fence becomes visible on the left side of the street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a fog-shrouded street that gradually transitions from a residential area into a stark industrial zone. It begins with the character passing a white delivery van on the right while a chain-link fence and overhead power lines emerge from the gray haze on the left. As the character advances, the environment shifts toward a more industrial atmosphere dominated by a network of utility poles and power lines stretching across the sky. The scene then expands to reveal a large industrial warehouse looming through the fog, with the perimeter fence continuing parallel to the sidewalk. Finally, the camera approaches the end of the street, where the warehouse dominates the view and a concrete loading dock becomes visible.
